name: DataTable
description: A structured data storage table within the Workato workspace.

id.description: Unique identifier of the data table.

name.description: Display name of the data table.

folder_id.description: ID of the folder containing this data table.

schema.description: List of column definitions for the table.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the data table was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the data table was last updated.
